title: arctostaphylos nummularia var. sensitiva
intro: Arctostaphylos nummularia var. sensitiva, also known as sensitive manzanita or bearberry, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural source of arbutin, a compound that has been used to treat various health conditions, including urinary tract infections and inflammation. The health benefits of Arctostaphylos nummularia var. sensitiva include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Arctostaphylos nummularia var. sensitiva can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
